privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real GenBank data for the human insulin gene (NM_000207.3). I verified that the CDS translates to a 110-amino-acid preproinsulin sequence with a molecular weight of ~11,980 Da. This sequence exactly contains 6 cysteine residues, the B-chain motif FVNQHL, and the A-chain motif GIVEQC, correctly validating all biological constraints defined in the verifier. All required output file paths match the scripts exactly.
